title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Intense Northeast blizzard had a ‘Goldilocks’ situation to roll up monster snow totals
items.description: Meteorologists say the powerful nor’easter smacking the Northeast is a classic, record-setting blizzard.

items.title: Blizzard live updates: Snow totals top 2 feet as wind gusts reach 80 mph
items.description: A massive winter storm is barreling through the Northeast, dumping more than 2 feet of snow.

items.title: Some U.S. Embassy staff in Beirut ordered to leave amid escalating tensions
items.description: The State Department has ordered some staff in the U.S. Embassy in Beirut to begin to leave Lebanon, multiple sources familiar with the matter said.

items.title: Dow slides nearly 800 points as AI and tariff risks rattle investors
items.description: The Dow Jones slid nearly 800 points as investors fret over AI disruption and react to President Trump's new tariff agenda.

items.title: Snow still falling across Northeast U.S. as massive blizzard continues track
items.description: More than half a million power outages have been reported across the East Coast as a historic blizzard continues to impact states from Maryland to Mai...

items.title: What to know about Mexico violence as president offers reassurances
items.description: Widespread cartel-organized violence erupted following his death, with vehicles set on fire and hundreds of road blockages, Mexican officials said.

items.title: EU fails to pass new sanctions targeting Russia after Hungary objects
LIVE:  ABC News Live
items.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

items.title: Latest on Trump's plan to raise global tariffs to 15% after Supreme Court ruling
items.description: President Trump said Saturday that he will raise global tariffs to 15% after the Supreme Court struck down a set of sweeping global tariffs in a decis...

items.title: WATCH:  Smoke blankets Mexico's Puerto Vallarta after death of cartel leader
items.description: Widespread violence erupted after a cartel boss was killed in a military raid.

items.title: Trump continues to lash out at Supreme Court after tariff ruling
items.description: President Trump continues to lash out at the Supreme Court days after a majority of justices struck down most of his global tariffs as illegal.

items.title: Tariffs pose "huge uncertainty" after Supreme Court ruling, experts say
items.description: The Trump administration is unlikely to back down from pursuing additional tariffs following the Supreme Court decision, according to trade experts.
